user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new user defined field, so that I can capture additional employee data beyond the standard fields
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the User Defined Fields screen; When I click Add New User Defined Field and set its name, field type, mandatory and default flags; Then the field is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set View and Edit permissions per user defined field for HR, Reporting Manager and Employee, so that custom data is only accessible to appropriate roles
acceptance_criteria: Given a user defined field exists; When I toggle View and Edit for each role; Then those permissions are applied to the field

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose a field type such as Textbox or Calendar for a user defined field, so that the field captures data in the correct format
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a user defined field; When I select its field type; Then the field enforces that input type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all user defined fields with their type, mandatory, default and per-role access, so that I can review the custom field setup
acceptance_criteria: Given user defined fields exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Field name, Field type, Mandatory, Is Default and the HR, Reporting Manager and Employee View/Edit permissions

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit and save an existing user defined field, so that I can keep custom fields accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a user defined field is listed; When I click Edit, change its details and click Save; Then the updated field is persisted
